condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with loose submit_action_object tool input and tool_choice=auto because DeepSeek thinking mode rejects forced tool choice.

content.thinking:
The task is clear: I need to produce a single JSON object with:
- response: a non-empty string
- open_items: an array with one bounded follow-up item (using kind and text)
- schedule_requests: an array with exactly one wake, including purpose and requested_context, where requested_context uses the recall tool with the specified record_id

Let me construct this carefully.

The open item must have "kind" and "text" fields. The schedule request must have "purpose" and "requested_context". The requested_context should include a recall tool reference with the given record ID.

No policy_action on this cycle.

open_items.text: Resolve the bounded follow-up item: verify the recall target eca7487b-a09b-59b1-8aee-c41cfb947c34 and confirm its contents are intact and actionable for the autonomy pilot.

input.response: Seed wake acknowledged. One bounded follow-up item identified and preserved as an open item, with a single wake scheduled to resolve it using the specified recall target.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the single bounded follow-up item by inspecting and acting on the recalled record.
